amendatorysection.catchline: District; consolidation; petition; hearing; notice; resolution of county board.
amendatorysection.para: (1) A petition to consolidate two or more districts in a county may be filed:
(a) By persons that own not less than twenty-five percent of the territory of each district in the proposed consolidation; and
(b) If special assessments have been or will be imposed in each district in the proposed consolidation.
(2) A petition described in subsection (1) of this section shall be filed with the county clerk.

(3) If a petition is filed pursuant to this section, the board shall set a time and place for a hearing pursuant to sections 39-1641 and 39-1642. At the hearing the board may pass a resolution consolidating the districts that are described in the petition.
